testcase.name: test_01_create_fresh_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:66: in test_01_create_fresh_submission assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create submission: {"detail":"A submission is already pending review for this milestone. Wait for review or withdraw the existing submission."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_verify_submission_in_review_queue

failure.message: AssertionError: Submission None not found in review queue assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:103: in test_02_verify_submission_in_review_queue assert found, f"Submission {TestFullDesignApprovalFlow.test_submission_id} not found in review queue" E AssertionError: Submission None not found in review queue E assert False

testcase.name: test_03_approve_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:118: in test_03_approve_submission assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to approve submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to approve submission: {"detail":"Submission not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_verify_approved_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:134: in test_04_verify_approved_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get submission: {"detail":"Submission not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_01_create_submission_for_rejection

skipped.message: Could not create submission: {"detail":"A submission is already pending review for this milestone. Wait for review or withdraw the existing submission."}
